name: Nuoc Cham Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 fresh red chilis, seeded and shredded (you can use less if you want it less spicy)
1/4 cup tamari or light soy sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shredded chilis, lime juice, tamari or light soy sauce, grated carrots, and rice vinegar in a bowl.
2. Add the water and stir well to combine all ingredients.
3. Taste the mixture and add sugar as desired. Adjust the amount of lime juice to achieve your preferred level of tanginess.
4. Mix everything thoroughly until well combined.
5. Enjoy the Nuoc Cham Sauce with your favorite dishes!
